Hacker News Confidence

Less annoying hacker news. (What is this?)

This site scrapes Hacker News once every 30 minutes, then sorts according to this formula, with upvotes as positive signals and comments as negative ones. In my experience, the best articles to read on HN are the ones with a high upvote-to-discussion ratio. Mostly because controversial pieces tend to produce a disproportionate number of comments compared to upvotes.


  1. Tony Hoare has died 1942 upvotes, 252 comments
  2. Where Some See Strings, She Sees a Space-Time Made of Fractals 25 upvotes, 1 comments
  3. U+237C ⍼ Is Azimuth 372 upvotes, 73 comments
  4. Show HN: I built an ISP infrastructure emulator from scratch with a custom vBNG 10 upvotes, 0 comments
  5. TADA: Speech generation through text-acoustic synchronization 87 upvotes, 22 comments
  6. Temporal: A nine-year journey to fix time in JavaScript 105 upvotes, 32 comments
  7. Cloudflare crawl endpoint 426 upvotes, 162 comments
  8. Whistleblower claims ex-DOGE member says he took Social Security data to new job 451 upvotes, 174 comments
  9. Making WebAssembly a first-class language on the Web 58 upvotes, 16 comments
  10. AI Agent Hacks McKinsey 187 upvotes, 68 comments
  11. Bypassing PatchGuard on Windows x64 (2005) 8 upvotes, 0 comments
  12. PeppyOS: A simpler alternative to ROS 2 (now with containers support) 53 upvotes, 15 comments
  13. Building a TB-303 from Scratch 172 upvotes, 66 comments
  14. Entities enabling scientific fraud at scale are large, resilient, growing (2025) 160 upvotes, 61 comments
  15. SSH Secret Menu 304 upvotes, 142 comments
  16. Faster asin() was hiding in plain sight 100 upvotes, 43 comments
  17. Zig – Type Resolution Redesign and Language Changes 355 upvotes, 193 comments
  18. Show HN: Open-source browser for AI agents 22 upvotes, 6 comments
  19. Writing my own text editor, and daily-driving it 175 upvotes, 91 comments
  20. BitNet: 100B Param 1-Bit model for local CPUs 184 upvotes, 99 comments
  21. Wiz joins Google 61 upvotes, 29 comments
  22. Create value for others and don’t worry about the returns 597 upvotes, 399 comments
  23. Elevated errors on login with Claude Code 21 upvotes, 7 comments
  24. Launch HN: Prism (YC X25) – Workspace and API to generate and edit videos 11 upvotes, 3 comments
  25. Lego's 0.002mm specification and its implications for manufacturing (2025) 251 upvotes, 190 comments
  26. Yann LeCun raises $1B to build AI that understands the physical world 565 upvotes, 458 comments
  27. Hurricane Electric (HE.NET) IPv6 tunnelbroker page offline due to expired domain 16 upvotes, 6 comments
  28. Show HN: Klaus – OpenClaw on a VM, batteries included 19 upvotes, 10 comments
  29. Show HN: Vanilla JavaScript refinery simulator built to explain job to my kids 3 upvotes, 0 comments
  30. Launch HN: Sentrial (YC W26) – Catch AI Agent Failures Before Your Users Do 5 upvotes, 5 comments

Last generated 1:00am, 12 March 2026. Source here.
